# Acme Habits Tracker

> AI-powered habit tracker. Build habits that actually stick — coaching
> built on Claude, streak tracking, Supabase-backed sync.

## Docs

- [API docs](https://api.acmehabits.com/docs): full REST + MCP reference
- [Getting started](https://acmehabits.com/docs/getting-started): 5-minute
  setup for self-hosters
- [Authentication](https://acmehabits.com/docs/auth): OAuth + dynamic
  client registration

## API

- [OpenAPI spec](/openapi.json): machine-readable API description
- [MCP server card](/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): MCP tools and
  transport
- [Agent registration](/auth.md): how agents register and authenticate

## Optional

- [Pricing](/pricing): plans and limits
- [Source](https://github.com/acme-internal/habits-tracker): private mirror
